preview.summary: Group B's heavyweight fixture sees Switzerland, the section's top seed, face co-hosts Canada in front of a partisan Vancouver crowd. Xhaka's measured midfield control meets the pace and ambition of Marsch's Canadians, with qualification stakes likely on the line.
preview.homeForm: Switzerland are the highest-ranked side in the group at 19th, with Granit Xhaka captaining at his fourth straight World Cup.
preview.awayForm: Canada compete as co-hosts with their strongest-ever squad, sweating on Alphonso Davies' hamstring recovery.
preview.homeKey: Granit Xhaka, record-capped captain who dictates Swiss tempo.
preview.awayKey: Alphonso Davies, Bayern flyer and Canada's talismanic captain.
storylines: A likely group-deciding clash between the section's strongest sides
Akanji and the Swiss back line against Canada's pace
Vancouver roars for the co-hosts against the seeded favourites
preview.h2h: Switzerland beat Canada 1-0 at the 2022 World Cup; Canada won a 2002 friendly 3-1.
